name: You're her candy
description:
TW: Giantess, Size Difference Vore (Avoidable), Unaware

During preparations for the halloween night, wicked witch using her wicked magic made you shrink down to an inch and gave you a task to get, like, a thousand candies during the Halloween night or you'll stay tiny forever. Fortunately, a girl in a werewolf costume picked you up... Thinking you're a candy.

There are several routes you can go, like staying silent, so she'll keep assuming your a candy and she'll eat you. Or make your presence clear and either ask for help, or ask her to eat you or smth.
